description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 20 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 24 mins. His coding was mostly in Java (49%), with Markdown (17%) and Other (34%) making up the rest. No public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed in the data.
